summary: W922 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W921's selected-difference projection closed-map leaves as primitive closed-set image quantifiers. The new selectedDifferenceClosedMapPi1/2/3PrimitiveW922 fields state that every closed subset of the corresponding source component has closed image under the selected projection map, and the OfPrimitive helpers reconstruct W921's IsClosedMap fields before projecting through the W921 route. Product success remains false because all W922 route leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W922 exposes the selected-difference projection IsClosedMap fields as primitive closed-set image conditions, but those primitive fields and the rest of the W922 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W922 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W922 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions inherited through W920, raw target surjectivity and compactness propositions, primitive selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-set image propositions, the primitive mapped explicit cokernel closed-set image proposition, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W922 closed-map selected-difference-primitive-fields explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from source-image normalization, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, branch selection, endpoint facts, localized-right-adjoint data, source-category triangulation evidence, relation primitive proofs, mapped-cokernel primitive proof, selected-difference primitive proofs, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
